SLOT rmhConfigProperties
    INSERT {
        property ~&6503679477&~ rmhFloatbarVisible: ~&214625660372&~
    }
END SLOT

SLOT rmhConfigAliases
    INSERT {
        property ~&214620122227&~ rmhFloatbarVisible: ~&7083272960857&~.rmhFloatbarVisible
    }
END SLOT

SLOT rmhSettingsQuicktoolsModel
    INSERT {
        {
           ~&214632764553&~: "Floating toolbar",
           ~&478136262235079021&~: "FouzR's implementation of the floating toolbar for rmHacks",
           ~&233723734822480&~: ~&7082020628281&~.rmhFloatbarVisible,
           ~&7082453764199&~: () => { ~&7082020628281&~.rmhFloatbarVisible = !~&7082020628281&~.rmhFloatbarVisible },
        },
    }
END SLOT

AFFECT [[10008392000802964043]]
    TRAVERSE [[7081645463424]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            signal ~&16404285191348324656&~
        }
        TRAVERSE [[254480451320573660]]#[[12920733285382795992]] > [[425121728314878811.8398643967132532355]]
            LOCATE AFTER ALL
            INSERT {
                ~&383135108587212173&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&16404285191348324656&~()
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[4354033616793223840]]
    TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&383135108587212173&~: {
                ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatAddRedo();
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[18660494620083468]]
    TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&383135108587212173&~: {
                ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatAddUndo();
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11307296056816811835]]
    TRAVERSE [[454089850271038938]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&383135108587212173&~: {
                ~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.floatToolSel();
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            signal floatAddRedo
            signal floatAddUndo
            signal floatToolSel
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    IMPORT [[233700934949963.233693781272506]] 1.0
    IMPORT [[7082573613689.5972775.7712892662059645]] 1.0
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7712892662059645]] 1.0
    IMPORT Qt.labs.settings 1.0
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[6650786433440202278]]
        INSERT {
            signal resetFloatBarPosition
            signal presetSave
            signal toggleFloatQuick
        }
        TRAVERSE [[6502786168]] > [[8398044571386570029]]
            LOCATE AFTER [[6502786168]]
            INSERT {
                ~&454089850271038938&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: floatBarSettings
                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&454089850271038938&~.~&6503187275&~.~&8398643967132532355&~
                    ~&233745975898428&~: ~&6504254477&~
                    ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&7712989577739634&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.rmhFloatbarVisible
                    ~&254542253295368380&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233718999756776&~(floatBarSettings)
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"551690684902850748&~
                    ~&6144132522167405889&~: ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: ~&233724020048228&~
                        ~&233744706647566&~: 0
                        ~&214646099849&~: 420
                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&13206231600618488452&~ {
                            ~&8399617258045453977&~: "Floating ToolBar"
                            readonly property  ~&6503679477&~ tooLong: ~&8399617258045453977&~>200
                            ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
                            ~&12972124760817227032&~: tooLong?~&6503165774&~.~&7081723389952&~:~&6503165774&~.~&6503286979&~
                            ~&8399617258037555420&~: tooLong?~&6503165774&~.~&430968154721198747&~:~&6503165774&~.~&254483130633986300&~
                            ~&478136262235079021&~: "Made by FouzR"
                        }
                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&15740235808997988493&~ {
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        }
                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
                            ~&214632764553&~: "QuickTools"
                            ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"6452766492113250787&~
                            ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
                            ~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&254542236275632405&~: ~&6504254477&~.toggleFloatQuick()
                        }
                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
                            ~&5972374&~: quickPresetSave
                            property ~&7083178290016&~ ~&6503664356&~: "Save Configuration"
                            property ~&7083178290016&~ baseIcon:~&"1888152859225879307&~
                            property ~&7083178290016&~ ~&6504275384&~: "Saved Configuration"
                            property ~&7083178290016&~ saveIcon:~&"7424590230465671801&~
                            ~&8399601734642709923&~: baseIcon
                            ~&214632764553&~: ~&6503664356&~
                            ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
                            ~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&254542253295368380&~: {
                                ~&6504254477&~.presetSave();
                                quickPresetSave.~&214632764553&~ = ~&6504275384&~;
                                quickPresetSave.~&8399601734642709923&~=saveIcon;
                            }
                            ~&8399894427451672267&~: {
                                quickPresetSave.~&214632764553&~ = ~&6503664356&~;
                                quickPresetSave.~&8399601734642709923&~ = baseIcon;
                            }
                        }
                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
                            ~&214632764553&~: "Reset FloatBar"
                            ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"8609871180810563551&~
                            ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&15640708674084664669&~
                            ~&8400129127120172259&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                            ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                ~&6504254477&~.resetFloatBarPosition()
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT {
            function selectFloatEraser(~&214629689753&~) {
                ~&197091758&~ ~&214624950331&~ = ~&6504117156&~;
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197091758&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < _editingTools.~&214622615378&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                    ~&197091758&~ entryI = _editingTools.~&7082786471789&~(~&180978&~).~&6503936152&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (entryI.~&496507535093048780&~ == ~&"7082627422347&~) {
                        ~&214624950331&~ = entryI;
                        ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~(~&214624950331&~);
                        ~&214621519406&~;
                    }
                }
                ~&6504254477&~.~&5107434981825242642&~(~&214629689753&~);
                ~&1318897126668497941&~(~&214624950331&~, 0);
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT




AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    IMPORT [[197080199.7083211239901]] 1.0 [[254477762679831355]]
    IMPORT [[233700934949963.7711528871884381]] 2.15
    IMPORT [[233700934949963.233693781272506]] 2.15
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[5972374]]
        INSERT {
            signal toggleFloatQuick
            signal resetPosition
            property ~&6503679477&~ floatToolsEnabled: ~&214625660372&~
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[15549782143769420265]] > [[254480451320573660]]
        TRAVERSE [[233704648923420]]
            LOCATE AFTER ALL
            INSERT {
                onResetFloatBarPosition: () => {
                    ~&6504254477&~.resetPosition();
                }
                onPresetSave: () => {floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile()}
                onToggleFloatQuick: {~&6504254477&~.toggleFloatQuick();}

                onFloatAddRedo: () => {
                    floatQuick.addNewToolPlus(~&"6503093235&~, 91, 0)
                }
                onFloatAddUndo: () => {
                    floatQuick.addNewToolPlus(~&"6503210847&~, 90, 0)
                }
                onFloatToolSel: () => {
                    ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("In toolsel");
                    ~&5972376&~ (isQuickPenSelected){
                        ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("is Selected");
                        floatQuick.quickTool = floatQuick.quickTool.~&7082656280847&~(
                            function(~&6503936152&~) {
                                ~&7083121450889&~ !(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~)?(((~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~) &&
                                        (~&6503936152&~.~&197098340&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~) &&
                                        (~&6503936152&~.~&496319807495899597&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~) &&
                                        (~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~))):
                                        (~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ && ~&6503936152&~.~&6504337259&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ && ~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~));
                            }
                        )
                        floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile();
                    } ~&6503784146&~ {
                        ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("is not selected ");
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~)){
                            floatQuick.addNewTool(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~, ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~,~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~,~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~);
                            floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile();
                        }
                        ~&6503784146&~ {
                            ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~(" is not writing tool");
                            floatQuick.addNewToolPlus(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~, ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~,~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT




AFFECT [[2328484894988065446]]
    IMPORT [[233700934949963.7711528871884381]] 2.15
    IMPORT [[233700934949963.233693781272506]] 2.15
    IMPORT Qt.labs.settings 1.0 QtSettings
    TRAVERSE [[8397788359424131273]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property ~&6503679477&~ gFloatToolsEnabled: ~&214625660372&~
            property ~&6503679477&~ timeOutBeforeMoving: ~&214625660372&~
            property ~&6503679477&~ timeOutBeforeMovingTools: ~&214625660372&~
            property ~&6503679477&~ isQuickPenSelected: ~&214625660372&~
            property ~&6503679477&~ floatbarExtended: ~&214625660372&~
        }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE [[8397788359424131273]] > [[8397993708429497603]] > [[8397993708429497603]]
        TRAVERSE [[7081645463424]]#[[15793094956877902211]]
            LOCATE BEFORE ALL
            INSERT {
                ~&233681166222244&~ {
                    ~&6504426203&~: ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&6503936152&~
                    ~&7083194890448&~: ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&6503936152&~
                    property: 'floatToolsEnabled'
                    ~&214644635174&~: gFloatToolsEnabled
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
        TRAVERSE [[7081645463424]]#rmhDocumentViewSplit
            LOCATE BEFORE ALL
            INSERT {
                ~&233681166222244&~ {
                    ~&6504426203&~: rmhDocumentViewSplit.~&6503936152&~
                    ~&7083194890448&~: rmhDocumentViewSplit.~&6503936152&~
                    property: 'floatToolsEnabled'
                    ~&214644635174&~: gFloatToolsEnabled
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
        LOCATE AFTER [[7081645463424]]#altToolbar
        INSERT {
            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: rmhDocumentViewSplit.~&6503936152&~
                function onToggleFloatQuick() {
                    gFloatToolsEnabled = !gFloatToolsEnabled;
                }

                function onResetPosition(){
                    ~&6504254477&~.floatbarExtended = ~&6504329801&~;
                    floatQuick.moveToPosition((~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~-floatQuick.~&214646099849&~)/2,0);
                }
            }

            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&6503936152&~
                function onToggleFloatQuick() {
                    gFloatToolsEnabled = !gFloatToolsEnabled;
                }

                function onResetPosition(){
                    ~&6504254477&~.floatbarExtended = ~&6504329801&~;
                    floatQuick.moveToPosition((~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~-floatQuick.~&214646099849&~)/2,0);
                }
            }

            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~ {
                property ~&197102514&~ currentDocumentView: mainDocumentSelected ? ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&6503936152&~ : rmhDocumentViewSplit.~&6503936152&~
                property ~&197102514&~ currentToolbar: mainDocumentSelected ? mainToolbar.~&6503936152&~ : altToolbar.~&6503936152&~
                ~&5972374&~: floatQuick
                ~&233748328658231&~: floatQuick.currentDocumentView.floatToolsEnabled && ~&15793094956877902211&~.~&6503936152&~ && ~&533861137338760383&~ && ~&7082020628281&~.rmhFloatbarVisible
                ~&214641137009&~: 1
                ~&504576868586410052&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&6502604167&~.~&7082453764421&~: floatQuickHandle.~&6503754151&~.~&7082453764421&~
                property ~&6503679477&~ moveTool: ~&214625660372&~
                property ~&6504243117&~ originalX
                property ~&6504243117&~ originalY
                function moveToPosition(newX, ~&6504100076&~) {
                    ~&180993&~ = newX;
                    ~&180994&~ = ~&6504100076&~;
                }
                property ~&197088788&~  presetState: 1
                property ~&197102514&~ quickTool: []
                property ~&6504243117&~ total_width
                function addNewTool( ~&7713617204171177&~, toolId, toolRGB, toolPalette, toolThickness) {
                    quickTool.~&6504189257&~({
                        ~&6504337259&~: ~&7713617204171177&~,
                        ~&6504326343&~: toolId,
                        ~&197098340&~: toolRGB,
                        ~&496319807495899597&~: toolPalette,
                        ~&254549061334391125&~: toolThickness
                    })
                    quickToolChanged()
                }

                function addNewToolPlus(~&7713617204171177&~, toolId, toolThickness) {
                    quickTool.~&6504189257&~({
                        ~&6504337259&~: ~&7713617204171177&~,
                        ~&6504326343&~: toolId,
                        ~&254549061334391125&~: toolThickness
                    })
                    quickToolChanged()
                }

                function moveQuickTool(fromIndex, toIndex) {
                    ~&5972376&~ (fromIndex < 0 || fromIndex >= quickTool.~&7082886407723&~ ||
                        toIndex < 0 || toIndex >= quickTool.~&7082886407723&~) {
                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
                    }
                    ~&214622607920&~ toolToMove = quickTool.~&7083173330345&~(fromIndex, 1)[0];
                    quickTool.~&7083173330345&~(toIndex, 0, toolToMove);
                    quickToolChanged();
                    ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
                }

                QtSettings.~&7712198086779994&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: floatQuickSettings
                    ~&7712874798136519&~: "FloatingToolbar"

                    property ~&214620122227&~ quicktool: floatQuick.quickTool
                    property ~&214620122227&~ extended: ~&6504254477&~.floatbarExtended
                }

                function saveQuickToolFile() {
                    floatQuickSettings.sync();
                }

                ~&8398044571386570029&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: gridLayoutObject
                    ~&6503819969&~: (((floatQuick.~&180993&~<60)||(floatQuick.~&180993&~>0.83*~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~))&&(floatQuick.~&180994&~<0.91*~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~)) ? ~&8398044571386570029&~.~&454090249410509812&~ : ~&8398044571386570029&~.~&441360769245023669&~
                    ~&3009194557570366524&~: 0
                    ~&8400036622101322246&~: 0
                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: floatQuickHandleParent
                        ~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
                        ~&6504337259&~: floatQuick.~&6504337259&~
                        ~&8399601734642709923&~: !~&6504254477&~.floatbarExtended ? ~&"551690684902850748&~ : ~&"4663243347623906140&~
                        ~&7713561545874130&~: floatQuick.currentDocumentView === rmhDocumentViewSplit.~&6503936152&~
                        ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                            ~&5972374&~: floatQuickHandle
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                            ~&6503754151&~.~&7083194890448&~: floatQuick
                            ~&254542253295368380&~: () => {
                            floatQuick.originalX = floatQuick.~&180993&~;
                            floatQuick.originalY = floatQuick.~&180994&~    ;
                            ~&6504254477&~.timeOutBeforeMovingTools=~&6504329801&~;

                            }
                            property ~&197088788&~ snapThreshold: 30
                            ~&383135108587212173&~: () => { ~&6504254477&~.floatbarExtended = !~&6504254477&~.floatbarExtended;}
                            ~&8399894427451672267&~: () => { ~&6504254477&~.timeOutBeforeMovingTools=~&214625660372&~;}
                            ~&12756630929064311461&~: {
                                ~&5972376&~ (~&6503754151&~.~&7082453764421&~) {
                                    ~&197102514&~ centerX = floatQuick.~&180993&~ + floatQuick.~&214646099849&~ / 2
                                    ~&197102514&~ centerY = floatQuick.~&180994&~ + floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ / 2
                                    ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180993&~ = 0
                                    }
                                    ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~ + floatQuick.~&214646099849&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180993&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ - floatQuick.~&214646099849&~
                                    }
                                    ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(centerX - ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ / 2) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180993&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ / 2 - floatQuick.~&214646099849&~ / 2
                                    }
                                    ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180994&~ = 0
                                    }
                                    ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~ + floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180994&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ - floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~
                                    }
                                    ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(centerY - ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / 2) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180994&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ / 2 - floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ / 2
                                    }
                                    ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~) < snapThreshold &&
                                        ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180993&~ = 0
                                        floatQuick.~&180994&~ = 0
                                    }
                                    ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~ + floatQuick.~&214646099849&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~) < snapThreshold &&
                                            ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180993&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ - floatQuick.~&214646099849&~
                                        floatQuick.~&180994&~ = 0
                                    }
                                    ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~) < snapThreshold &&
                                            ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~ + floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180993&~ = 0
                                        floatQuick.~&180994&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ - floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~
                                    }
                                    ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180993&~ + floatQuick.~&214646099849&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~) < snapThreshold &&
                                            ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(floatQuick.~&180994&~ + floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~) < snapThreshold) {
                                        floatQuick.~&180993&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&214646099849&~ - floatQuick.~&214646099849&~
                                        floatQuick.~&180994&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7082729686082&~ - floatQuick.~&7082729686082&~
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ~&7712155293725601&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: ~&7713519083900865&~
                        ~&214634455770&~: floatQuick.quickTool
                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                            required property ~&197102514&~ ~&254539508423767444&~
                            ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
                                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.timeOutBeforeMovingTools
                            }
                            ~&233748328658231&~:  ~&6504254477&~.floatbarExtended
                            ~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
                            ~&6504337259&~: floatQuick.~&6504337259&~
                            ~&8399601734642709923&~: {
                                ~&214622607920&~ toolIcons = {
                                    15: ~&"12472390807386460417&~,
                                    17: ~&"1104274047935997048&~,
                                    18: ~&"9093988532389370539&~,
                                    14: ~&"5204404160700829527&~,
                                    13: ~&"14459632586516747131&~,
                                    21: ~&"4188248842830809614&~,
                                    16: ~&"5204259481269240318&~,
                                    23: ~&"5204547061482173331&~,
                                    12: ~&"1413836428252919100&~,
                                    8: ~&"8173742602784935909&~,
                                    6: ~&"1888152859074732210&~,
                                    11: ~&"7322837842298105651&~,
                                    90: ~&"15094524446772182502&~,
                                    91: ~&"15094524446772064890&~
                                };

                                ~&7083121450889&~ toolIcons[~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~];
                            }
                            ~&6503165774&~{
                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~:~&7083038346995&~.~&197100796&~
                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~:~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                                ~&490371291080887915&~: 5
                                ~&214622605608&~: (floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~) ? ((floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ &&
                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&496319807495899597&~ &&
                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&197098340&~ &&
                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&254549061334391125&~) ? ~&"214646069354&~:~&"214621299494&~ ):((floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ &&
                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&254549061334391125&~) ? ~&"214646069354&~:~&"214621299494&~ ))
                                ~&6504315758&~: (~&254539508423767444&~.~&254549061334391125&~)
                                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ != 8 && ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ !=11 && ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ !=90 && ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ !=91 && !~&6504254477&~.timeOutBeforeMovingTools
                                ~&6503823200&~.~&7082646817675&~: "Helvetica"
                                ~&6503823200&~.~&7083316716977&~: ~&6502673216&~.~&6502529386&~
                                ~&6503823200&~.~&254543734469215886&~: 18
                            }
                            ~&7713561545874130&~: floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~) ? (floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ && floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&496319807495899597&~ && floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&197098340&~ && floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&254549061334391125&~): (floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ && floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ === ~&254539508423767444&~.~&254549061334391125&~)
                            ~&11058020975532475353&~: {

                                ~&197091758&~ hasTrue = ~&214625660372&~
                                ~&197085552&~ (~&197091758&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&7713519083900865&~.~&214622615378&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                                    ~&197091758&~ ~&6503936152&~ = ~&7713519083900865&~.~&7082786471789&~(~&180978&~)
                                    ~&5972376&~ (~&6503936152&~.~&7713561545874130&~) {
                                        hasTrue = ~&6504329801&~
                                        ~&214621519406&~
                                    }
                                }
                                isQuickPenSelected = hasTrue
                            }

                            ~&254480451320573660&~.~&4464585548018432538&~:{
                                isQuickPenSelected = ~&214625660372&~;
                            }
                            ~&254542236275632405&~: () => { ~&5972376&~(floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~)){
                                                floatQuick.currentToolbar.~&254547531013823564&~(~&"233740920352621&~);
                                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ = ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~;
                                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~ = ~&254539508423767444&~.~&496319807495899597&~;
                                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~ = ~&254539508423767444&~.~&197098340&~;
                                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = ~&254539508423767444&~.~&254549061334391125&~;}
                                            ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ == 8 || ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ == 6){
                                                    floatQuick.currentToolbar.selectFloatEraser(~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~);
                                                    floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254528381676974702&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = ~&254539508423767444&~.~&254549061334391125&~;
                                            }
                                            ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ == 11){
                                                    floatQuick.currentToolbar.~&3352491319205423503&~()
                                            }
                                            ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ == 91 && floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&11179472971324505115&~.~&9062779519017704436&~){
                                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&11179472971324505115&~.~&6504243219&~();
                                            }
                                            ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ == 90 && floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&11179472971324505115&~.~&14521327022500200672&~){
                                                floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&11179472971324505115&~.~&6504360831&~();
                                            }
                            }
                            ~&383135108587212173&~: () => {
                                floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile();
                                ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ == 91) {
                                    floatQuick.quickTool = floatQuick.quickTool.~&7082656280847&~(
                                        function(~&6503936152&~) {
                                            ~&7083121450889&~ !((~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == 91 && ~&6503936152&~.~&6504337259&~ == ~&"6503093235&~ && ~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == 0))
                                        }
                                    );
                                }

                                ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ == 90)
                                {
                                    floatQuick.quickTool = floatQuick.quickTool.~&7082656280847&~(
                                        function(~&6503936152&~) {
                                            ~&7083121450889&~ !((~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == 90 && ~&6503936152&~.~&6504337259&~ == ~&"6503210847&~ && ~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == 0))
                                        }
                                    )
                                }
                                ~&6503784146&~
                                {
                                    floatQuick.moveTool = !floatQuick.moveTool
                                }
                            }

                            ~&254501108490678590&~{
                                ~&233748328658231&~: gridLayoutObject.~&6503819969&~ === ~&8398044571386570029&~.~&441360769245023669&~  && floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~) && !~&6504254477&~.timeOutBeforeMovingTools
                                ~&214622605608&~: {
                                    ~&214622607920&~ colorMaps = {
                                        23: {
                                            1075912220: ~&"6503861980&~,
                                            1946071552: "orangered",
                                            2160099282: "magenta",
                                            1295010528: "deepskyblue",
                                            1724002610: ~&"197098276&~,
                                            2157042289: "forestgreen",
                                            1945823001: ~&"7083395101253&~,
                                            1718932200: "cyan"
                                        },
                                        18: {
                                            4294962549: ~&"7083395101253&~,
                                            4290702078: "deepskyblue",
                                            4294090495: "mediumvioletred",
                                            4294951820: "orangered",
                                            4289527685: "forestgreen",
                                            4291282886: ~&"6503861980&~
                                        }
                                    };

                                    ~&214622607920&~ paletteColors = {
                                        0: ~&"214621299494&~,
                                        1: ~&"6503861980&~,
                                        2: ~&"214646069354&~,
                                        6: "blue",
                                        7: ~&"197098276&~,
                                        10: "limegreen",
                                        13: ~&"7083395101253&~,
                                        11: "cyan",
                                        12: "magenta"
                                    };

                                    ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ === 23 || ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ === 18) {
                                        ~&7083121450889&~ colorMaps[~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~][~&254539508423767444&~.~&197098340&~] || "beige";
                                    }

                                    ~&7083121450889&~ paletteColors[~&254539508423767444&~.~&496319807495899597&~] || "beige";
                                }
                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
                                ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                                ~&7082729686082&~: (~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~/5)
                                ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&214625660372&~
                            }
                            ~&254501108490678590&~{
                                ~&233748328658231&~: gridLayoutObject.~&6503819969&~ === ~&8398044571386570029&~.~&454090249410509812&~ && floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~) && !~&6504254477&~.timeOutBeforeMovingTools
                                ~&214622605608&~: {
                                    ~&214622607920&~ colorMaps = {
                                        23: {
                                            1075912220: ~&"6503861980&~,
                                            1946071552: "orangered",
                                            2160099282: "magenta",
                                            1295010528: "deepskyblue",
                                            1724002610: ~&"197098276&~,
                                            2157042289: "forestgreen",
                                            1945823001: ~&"7083395101253&~,
                                            1718932200: "cyan"
                                        },
                                        18: {
                                            4294962549: ~&"7083395101253&~,
                                            4290702078: "deepskyblue",
                                            4294090495: "mediumvioletred",
                                            4294951820: "orangered",
                                            4289527685: "forestgreen",
                                            4291282886: ~&"6503861980&~
                                        }
                                    };

                                    ~&214622607920&~ paletteColors = {
                                        0: ~&"214621299494&~,
                                        1: ~&"6503861980&~,
                                        2: ~&"214646069354&~,
                                        6: "blue",
                                        7: ~&"197098276&~,
                                        10: "limegreen",
                                        13: ~&"7083395101253&~,
                                        11: "cyan",
                                        12: "magenta"
                                    };

                                    ~&5972376&~ (~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ === 23 || ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~ === 18) {
                                        ~&7083121450889&~ colorMaps[~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504326343&~][~&254539508423767444&~.~&197098340&~] || "beige";
                                    }

                                    ~&7083121450889&~ paletteColors[~&254539508423767444&~.~&496319807495899597&~] || "beige";
                                }
                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                                ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ / 5
                                ~&7082729686082&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
                                ~&15640708674084664669&~: ~&214625660372&~
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: floatquickMoveLeft
                        ~&233748328658231&~: floatQuick.currentToolbar.~&7712989577739634&~ && floatQuick.moveTool
                        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
                                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.timeOutBeforeMovingTools
                        }
                        ~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
                        ~&6504337259&~: floatQuick.~&6504337259&~
                        ~&8399601734642709923&~: gridLayoutObject.~&6503819969&~ === ~&8398044571386570029&~.~&441360769245023669&~? ~&"5203726458251154181&~ : ~&"8609871180810563551&~
                        ~&254542236275632405&~: () => {
                            ~&214622607920&~ ~&214629676161&~ = floatQuick.quickTool.~&254529420688331106&~(function(~&6503936152&~) {
                                ~&7083121450889&~ (
                                    floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~)
                                        ? ((~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~) &&
                                            (~&6503936152&~.~&197098340&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~) &&
                                            (~&6503936152&~.~&496319807495899597&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~) &&
                                            (~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~))
                                        : ((
                                            ~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~) &&
                                            (~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~)
                                        )
                                );
                            });

                            ~&5972376&~ (~&214629676161&~ !=0) {
                                floatQuick.moveQuickTool(~&214629676161&~,~&214629676161&~-1);
                                floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile();
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: floatquickMoveRight
                        ~&233748328658231&~: floatQuick.currentToolbar.~&7712989577739634&~ && floatQuick.moveTool
                        ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
                                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.timeOutBeforeMovingTools
                        }
                        ~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
                        ~&6504337259&~: floatQuick.~&6504337259&~
                        ~&8399601734642709923&~: gridLayoutObject.~&6503819969&~ === ~&8398044571386570029&~.~&441360769245023669&~? ~&"5702276458909383512&~ : ~&"5203726458250878130&~
                        ~&254542236275632405&~: () => {
                            ~&214622607920&~ ~&214629676161&~ = floatQuick.quickTool.~&254529420688331106&~(function(~&6503936152&~) {
                                ~&7083121450889&~ (floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~)?((~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~) &&
                                    (~&6503936152&~.~&197098340&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~) &&
                                    (~&6503936152&~.~&496319807495899597&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~) &&
                                    (~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~)):((
                                    ~&6503936152&~.~&6504326343&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~) &&
                                    (~&6503936152&~.~&254549061334391125&~ == floatQuick.currentDocumentView.~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~)
                                    ));
                                }
                            );
                            floatQuick.moveQuickTool(~&214629676161&~,~&214629676161&~+1);
                            floatQuick.saveQuickToolFile();
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
